parameters: The dragons look down on the weak, playing with and killing them.
Being the lowest class of humans, they're not merciful to us.
You look pretty confident, but you should know that Back Attacks
You should avoid them at all costs. They'll use their glare on you,
then burn you to death. You don't stand a chance.
Dragons have killed a lot of slaves, but only when forced to.
Seeing the dragons so calm makes me think we humans are the
None of these books are of any use.
Wow, dragons are so cool! Whenever we fly together, I can't stop
Whenever dragons are used in battle, so many slaves die...
We're the ones who have to chase them out of their caves and
Tolkia uses their dragons in every battle. One day it'll be my turn.
Dragons are no longer allowed to be used in battle. Now us slaves
won't have to keep dying to them.
I'm so glad... I'm not going to wind up dead.
Don't enter that cave. The most deadly dragon in the country
The king considers it his greatest weapon, but when released it
My partner died a meaningless death to its indiscriminate attack.
I'll never let this go. I have to destroy it.
Fafnir's been defeated? Who could've...? No, I know who it was.
It was you, wasn't it? You killed that piece of shit for me.
This should bring my partner some peace. Thank you. Here, take this.
It's a poison designed to kill dragons. Even I could've defeated
Fafnir with this, provided I had the right timing.
Of course, if I had, Tolkia would've sent their whole army to hunt
me down. My life would've been over.
You saved me from that. Now I'm going to live for something
